home.heroSubtitle: A modern competitive programming platform. Practice 30+ algorithm problems across 15 languages, compete in contests, and track your progress.
home.featuresSubtitle: Every detail tuned for competitive programmers, interview preppers, and curious learners.
home.featuresBody: From beginner-friendly Easy problems to interview-grade Hard, LeetRank meets you where you are and pushes you forward.
home.heroBadgeShort: Now with 15 languages and a live judge queue
home.heroBody: A modern competitive programming platform with a production-grade Go judge, 10,000+ problems, and contests that rank you against developers worldwide.
home.languagesSubtitle: {count} languages supported, with one consistent runner contract.
home.feat1Body: Curated and synthetic problems across every difficulty, with hidden test cases that mirror real interview rigor.
home.feat2Body: Weekly competitions with live leaderboards, atomic scoring, and ratings that follow you across the platform.
home.feat3Body: Python, Go, Rust, Java, C++, Kotlin and more — all backed by a sandboxed Go judge with hard time limits.
home.feat4Body: Postgres, Redis, Caddy, Prometheus, Grafana. Helmed by a concurrency scheduler that absorbs burst load.
home.feat5Body: Per-language blocklists, JWT with httpOnly cookies, rate limiting, and full Zod validation at the boundary.
home.feat6Body: Discussion forums, editorial solutions, and a leaderboard that ranks dedup-aware unique problems solved.
home.ctaFinalSubtitle: Join thousands of programmers sharpening their skills every day.
home.ctaFinalBody: Join thousands of developers sharpening their skills. Free forever for individuals.

recommendations.headline: Your next
recommendations.subtitle: Five problems chosen from your solve history, topic momentum, and difficulty progression. Refreshed every 30 minutes.
recommendations.emptyBody: We need a few accepted solves to tailor your list. Try a problem to get started.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to continue your streak.
auth.signInToSubmitBody: You need an account to run code against the full test suite. Sign in to continue.

problems.title: Problems
problems.subtitle: Solve. Learn. Climb the ranks.
problems.headerSubtitle: Practice makes perfect. Choose a problem to solve.
problems.noProblemsBody: Try adjusting your search or filters to find what you're looking for.
problems.runHint: Run your code to see results here
problems.modalSignInTitle: Sign in to submit your solution
problems.modalSignInBody: Track your progress, climb the leaderboard, and join contests.
problems.modalExpiredBody: Sign in again to submit your solution.
problems.toastPermissionDeniedBody: You don't have permission to submit. Contact support if this is wrong.
problems.toastTooManyBody: Wait a moment and try again.
problems.toastJudgeUnavailableBody: The judge service is unavailable. Try again in a moment.
problems.toastNetworkBody: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

contests.title: Contests
contests.subtitle: Compete live. Climb the leaderboard.
contests.heroSubtitle: Compete with others and test your skills under pressure. Weekly rounds, live leaderboards, and ratings that follow you.
contests.noContestsBody: New contests are posted weekly. Bookmark this page or check back soon.
contests.tooltipLive: Limited to 10 join requests per minute

studyPlans.title: Study Plans
studyPlans.heroSubtitle: Curated, day-by-day curricula. Pick a plan, solve in sequence, finish strong.
studyPlans.noPlansBody: New plans drop weekly. Check back soon or start a custom one from any problem set.
studyPlans.notFoundBody: This plan was renamed or never existed. Browse all plans to pick another.
studyPlans.noProblemsBody: The curator has not added problems to this plan. Try another from the catalogue.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.subtitle: Top solvers across the platform.
leaderboard.noEntriesBody: Be the first to solve a problem and you'll show up here within a minute.
leaderboard.scoringFormula: Score = solved × 100 + recent-acceptance bonus. Refreshed every 60s.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeFallback: Welcome back! Keep up the great work.
dashboard.welcomeNamed: Welcome back, {name}! Keep up the great work.
dashboard.noSolvedBody: Pick a problem and submit an accepted solution to see it here.
dashboard.noBookmarksBody: Tap the bookmark icon on any problem page to save it for later.
dashboard.noSubmissionsBody: Run or submit code on any problem to populate this feed.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and retry.
errors.notFoundBody: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or was moved.
errors.forbiddenBody: You don't have permission to view this page.

daily.title: Daily Challenge
daily.empty: Today's challenge will be posted soon.

playback.title: Code playback
playback.emptyDescription: Submissions written before code playback launched, or with the recorder disabled, have no replay.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Track milestones across problems, contests, and streaks.
achievements.errorBody: We hit a snag fetching your achievements. Try again in a moment.
achievements.emptyBody: Solve problems and join contests to start earning achievements.
